name: Imidazole
mechanism: Fe-heme coordination in CYP450; azole antifungals

name: 1,2,4-Triazole
mechanism: Stronger Fe coordination than imidazole; improved selectivity

name: Thiazole
mechanism: π-π stacking; H-bond pattern; metabolically stable

name: Pyrazole
mechanism: Selective binding in COX-2 side pocket

name: 1,3,4-Thiadiazole
mechanism: H-bond pattern; metabolic stability vs oxadiazole

name: Benzimidazole
mechanism: Cys coordination in proton pump; PPI scaffold

name: 2-Aminothiazole
mechanism: H-bond donor array; high ligand efficiency

name: Benzotriazole
mechanism: UV stabilizer motif; H-bond acceptor array

name: 4-Aminopyrimidine

name: 2,4-Diaminopyrimidine

name: 2-Chloropyrimidine

mechanism: Salt bridge with Asp189 in S1 pocket

name: Pyridine-4-carboxamide
mechanism: Acyl-NAD adduct formation after KatG activation

name: Quinazoline
mechanism: Dual H-bond with kinase hinge motif

name: Oxindole (2-oxoindole)
mechanism: H-bond with kinase hinge; selectivity element

name: 7-Azaindole

name: Succinimide

name: δ-Valerolactone

mechanism: Larger ring lactam; different acylation kinetics

name: Macrolactone (12+ ring)

name: Sulfonamide (COX-2 type)
mechanism: Selective binding in COX-2 side pocket

name: Reversed amide (-NHCO-)

name: Piperidine

name: Morpholine
mechanism: Improved solubility; moderate basicity; LogP reducer

name: Tetrahydropyran (THP)
mechanism: Oxygen heterocycle; H-bond acceptor; metabolic stability

name: 3-Aminopyrrolidine
mechanism: Chiral center; spatial orientation of NH2

name: Thiomorpholine

name: Carboxylic acid (-COOH)

name: Ethyl ester (-COOEt)
mechanism: Prodrug; in vivo hydrolysis to acid

name: Acetic acid moiety (-CH2COOH)

name: 4-Fluorophenyl

name: Nitrophenyl (-NO2)

name: Pyrrolo[2,3-d]pyrimidine

name: Benzamide hinge binder

name: Quinazolin-4-amine

mechanism: Overcoming gatekeeper mutations; compact hinge binder

name: Trifluoromethylphenyl + amide DFG
